action.reasoning: Observation: naive sequential training leads to catastrophic forgetting with avg acc 0.0189, only last task has reasonable acc (others 0). Analysis: no mechanism to retain knowledge from previous tasks, classic CL failure mode on class-incremental CIFAR100. Decision: implement experience replay buffer (~200 samples/task, total ~2000), combine buffer with current task data for joint training, increase to 8 epochs/task, keep ResNet18+pretrained+augs. This should significantly boost average_accuracy while measuring iteration time.
